commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Codex web dashboard path to use one shared timeout deadline across cookie import, account/API checks, WebKit probes, final dashboard loading, and fresh-import retry handling.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible with high confidence: current main passes `webTimeout` into the final dashboard fetch while browser cookie import, account API probes, and WebKit probes retain separate fixed local waits. The linked issue also gives a concrete macOS CLI command where `--source web --web-timeout 30` exceeded a 90 second watchdog.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is owner-authored and currently conflicting, so the next action is maintainer/author branch refresh and validation rather than ClawSweeper cleanup or automated repair.

target.title: Bound the full Codex web fetch deadline
target.body:
## Summary

- Start one absolute deadline at the Codex web strategy boundary.
- Clamp browser cookie reads, account API requests, scratch and persistent WebKit probes, dashboard API preflight, navigation retries, final dashboard load, and fresh-import retry to the remaining budget.
- Run synchronous browser-cookie extraction off the caller path so macOS App Data consent cannot block past the deadline.
- Return a clear Codex web timeout error instead of opaque `NSURLError -1001` text.

Closes #1607.

## Proof

Exact reviewed head: `825fd773231b5f01f38d1f73efcfe6596251d9e8`

- 65 focused cookie-import, dashboard-fetcher, WebView-cache, and CLI fallback tests passed.
- Added injected-clock coverage for local timeout clamps, expired deadlines, navigation retry budgets, and a blocking cookie read.
- `make check` - clean.
- Full branch autoreview - clean, confidence 0.86; earlier accepted retry-budget finding fixed and regression-tested.
- Source CLI live proof with unresolved macOS App Data consent: `--source web --web-timeout 3` returned in 3.57s with `OpenAI web dashboard fetch timed out after 3 seconds.`
- `CODEXBAR_SIGNING=adhoc ./Scripts/package_app.sh` packaged exact head; deep strict codesign passed; bundle reports `CodexGitCommit=825fd773`.
- Packaged CLI repeated the same blocked-consent proof in 3.78s with the structured timeout message.

No App Data or Keychain permission was granted during testing.
target.author: steipete
